scripts.test:storybook: rm -f utils/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts --project=chromium
scripts.test:storybook:all: rm -f utils/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts
scripts.test:storybook:update: rm -f utils/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts --update-snapshots
